input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/20/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['ice hockey', 'medal count', 'closing ceremony', 'iran', 'nuclear', 'trump', 'manchester united', 'chelsea', 'champions league', 'super eight', 't20', 'france ambassador', 'ukraine', 'congress', 'doge']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/20/articles.jsonl'
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        if 'ice hockey' in title or ('hockey' in title and ('olympic' in title or 'gold' in title or 'semi' in title or 'final' in title)):
            print(f'{(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:140]}')
" 2>/dev/null | head -20
